Feature:AMO001 Get Member Wallet Balance 101ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet balance API
So that I can retrieve the member wallet balance for one or more currencies

Scenario:
Get balances for requested currencies
46ms 4

Given a merchant member exists 1ms Show Info + 
  platform_username:
    supermerchant1user

Info 

  platform_username:
    supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 44ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currencies": [
        "CNY",
        "THB"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 200,
      "body": {
        "code": 200,
        "data": {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "balances": {
            "CNY": -6514.521544,
            "THB": 0
          }
        },
        "message": "Success"
      }
    }

Info 

  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currencies": [
        "CNY",
        "THB"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 200,
      "body": {
        "code": 200,
        "data": {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "balances": {
            "CNY": -6514.521544,
            "THB": 0
          }
        },
        "message": "Success"
      }
    }

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 12ms
field value

currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "",
      "currencies": [
        "CNY",
        "THB"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 400,
      "body": {
        "error": [
          {
            "key": "platform_username",
            "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
          }
        ],
        "message": "Parameter error",
        "code": 400,
        "message_code": 11028
      }
    }

Show Info + 
  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currencies": [
        "USD",
        "MYR",
        "INVALID"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 400,
      "body": {
        "error": [
          {
            "key": "currencies.1",
            "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
          },
          {
            "key": "currencies.2",
            "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"

Feature:AMO013 Notify Wager Update < 1ms 3

As APISYS
I want to notify the merchant of wager updates

Scenario:
Successful wager notification
< 1ms 2

When APISYS notifies wager update with: < 1ms 

{
  "notification_type": "typeA",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "IMSPORT",
      "game_key": "IMSPORT",
      "wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-3",
      "origin_wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-1",
      "ticket_no": "ticketno_123",
      "platform_username": "member01",
      "type": 3,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": 1720694402,
      "settlement_time": 1720698600,
      "is_system_reward": true
    },
    {
      "game_type": "CRASH",
      "game_key": "CRASH_V2",
      "wager_no": "0002-20250117140015-188011927398-1",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": null,
      "platform_username": "member02",
      "type": 1,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 5.1,
      "payment_amount": 5.1,
      "effective_amount": 5,
      "profit_and_loss": 0,
      "wager_time": 1720694403,
      "settlement_time": null,
      "is_system_reward": false
    }
  ]
}
 

Then(/^APISYS notifies wager update with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO013 response should be successful < 1ms

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Full settlement credits the wallet

Feature:AMO008 Seamless Cancel Wager 17ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel wager API
So that I can refund a previously paid wager

Scenario:
Cancel wager refunds a prepared paid wager
17ms 2 3 2

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
  platform_username:
    supermerchant1user

Info 

  platform_username:
    supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 16ms Show Info + 
  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currencies": [
        "CNY"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 200,
      "body": {
        "code": 200,
        "data": {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "balances": {
            "CNY": -6514.521544
          }
        },
        "message": "Success"
      }
    }
  Balance (CNY): -6514.521544

Info 

  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currencies": [
        "CNY"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 200,
      "body": {
        "code": 200,
        "data": {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "balances": {
            "CNY": -6514.521544
          }
        },
        "message": "Success"
      }
    }
  Balance (CNY): -6514.521544

And a prepared paid wager fixture exists for: < 1ms
field value
wager_no <wager_no>
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>
payment_order_no <payment_order_no>
currency <currency>
payment_amount 30

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS cancels a wager with: < 1ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
wager_no <wager_no> 

Then(/^APISYS cancels a wager with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO008 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO008 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 30 < 1ms

Feature:Integration Flow - Request payment then cancel wager < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify paid wager cancellation refund flow end to end

Scenario:
Request payment 30 then cancel wager refunds the same 30
< 1ms 10 1

Transfer in increases wallet balance
107ms 6

    supermerchant1user

    supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 33ms Show Info +

      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currencies": [
        "CNY"
      ]
    }
  Response:

      "status": 200,
      "body": {
        "code": 200,
        "data": {

          "balances": {

session_id <session_id>

      "transfer_no": "1e2b7d78-6fcd-4343-8c89-42a686f68678",
      "game_type": "",

      "body": {
        "code": 200,
        "data": {

          "status": 1
        },
        "message": "Success"
      }
    }

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 50 29ms Show Info + 
  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currencies": [
        "CNY"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 200,
      "body": {
        "code": 200,
        "data": {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",

          }
        },
        "message": "Success"
      }

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 19ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
  API:
    POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
  Request:
    {
      "transfer_no": "944b5c4f-33b7-4644-a1da-21ae7366c6d7",
      "game_type": "",
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": "1.1234567",
      "session_id": "617f324f-a44e-4261-a5bd-c70d3592d959"
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 400,
      "body": {
        "error": [
          {
            "key": "amount",
            "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
          }
        ],
        "message": "Parameter error",
        "code": 400,
        "message_code": 11028
      }
    }

Info 

  API:
    POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in

Feature:AMO011 Request Transfer Out 120ms 3 8

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer out API
So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer out decreases wallet balance
29ms 1 2 3 1

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
  platform_username:
    supermerchant1user

Info 

  platform_username:
    supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests transfer out with: < 1ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -20.5
session_id <session_id> 

Then(/^APISYS requests transfer out with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO011 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -20.5
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5 < 1ms

When APISYS requests transfer out with: < 1ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -15
session_id <session_id>

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO011 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -15
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 15 < 1ms

status 1

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO011 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the response amount should equal the recorded wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms 

Then(/^the response amount should equal the recorded wallet balance in "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should be zero < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance in "([^"]*)" should be zero$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer in and is idempotent
< 1ms 1 5 3

transfer_no <transfer_no>

amount 25

});

});

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

field value
reference_id any non-empty value

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer out all integer balance < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer APIs in sequence
So that I can verify full integer-balance withdrawal behavior end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in 120.5 then transfer out without amount deducts 120 and leaves 0.5
< 1ms 8 3

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer in with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 120.5

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 120.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 120.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests transfer out with: < 1ms
transfer_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency> 

Then(/^APISYS requests transfer out with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
status success
amount 120

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 0.5 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 0.5$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: < 1ms
platform_username
currencies <currency>

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain balances: < 1ms
0.5 

Then(/^the response should contain balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer lifecycle through merchant wallet APIs < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify transfer credit, debit, reversal, and balance retrieval end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in 100, get balance, transfer out 35, get balance, cancel transfer, get balance
< 1ms 15 7

});
